name: firecrawl-deploy-integration
description: Deploy Firecrawl integrations to Vercel, Cloud Run, and Docker platforms. Use when deploying Firecrawl-powered applications to production, configuring platform-specific secrets, or setting up self-hosted Firecrawl. Trigger with phrases like "deploy firecrawl", "firecrawl Vercel", "firecrawl production deploy", "firecrawl Cloud Run", "firecrawl Docker".
